provider: HKU Faculty of Engineering BEng(CivE) syllabus
note: The official Faculty syllabus applies to students admitted in 2025-26 and thereafter. Recommended Year values are included only where the official suggested plan identifies a single year; the remaining core and elective courses stay unassigned because Years 2-3 are combined and students may take courses flexibly. CC##XXXX, the unconfirmed second AILTXXXX course, non-credit national education placeholders, the open 18-credit Elective/MSc pool, ENGG1200 appearing only in course descriptions, and external Focus-only courses are excluded because they do not form the closed coded curriculum table.
